song.title: I Take Thy Promise Lord
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) I take Thy promise, Lord, In all its length, And breadth and fulness,|| As my daily strength; Into life’s future fearless I may gaze, For, Jesus, Thou art with me all the days.
[V2] 2) Days may be coming fraught With loss and change, New scenes surround || My life and faces strange; I thank Thee that no day can ever break, Savior, when Thou wilt leave me or forsake.
[V3] 3) There may be days Of darkness and distress, When sin has pow’r to tempt, And care to press—|| Yet in the darkest day I will not fear, For, ’mid the shadows, Thou wilt still be near.
[V4] 4) Days there may be Of joy and deep delight, When earth seems fairest, And her skies most bright;|| Then draw me closer to Thee, Lest I rest elsewhere, my Savior, Than upon Thy breast.
[V5] 5) And all the other days That make my life, Marked by no special joy Or grief or strife—|| Days filled with quiet duties, trivial care— Burdens too small For other hearts to share—
[V6] 6) Spend Thou these days with me, All shall be Thine; So shall the darkest hour With glory shine.|| Then when these earthly years Have passed away, Let me be with Thee in the perfect day.
song.author: H.L. Richmond Deck
